title: Launch HN: Context.dev (YC S26) – API to get structured data from any website
summary: Context.dev 是一个 API 服务，可从任何网站提取结构化数据，支持 Markdown、截图、JSON 等输出。
translated_summary: Context.dev is an API that extracts structured data from any website, providing clean Markdown, screenshots, JSON, and brand context for developers and agents.
